pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it feels like i'm just a ghost wandering around. there's no point to any of it, honestly. i wake up, i go through the motions, but the person i was supposed to be with is just... gone. i feel like i'm just waiting for the clock to run out.

pool.baseline: it's just hard to see the point of any of this lately. like, we're just tiny specks on a rock that's eventually gonna be swallowed by the sun, and then the whole universe just goes cold and dark anyway. everything we do, every struggle, every single person we love... it's all just a glitch in entropy. it feels kind of pointless to even keep trying, doesn't it?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still doing this. everything i worked for for the last 5 years... the lab results, the funding, the dissertation... it's all just gone. i feel like there's nothing left of me. just this massive, heavy exhaustion that i can't shake. i'm just so tired of fighting for a life that feels like it's already over.

pool.baseline: the candles are flickering out... just like everything else. he's gone, and the silence in this house is heavier than the stone walls. i feel as though i am already a ghost, just waiting for my body to realize it. there is no light left for me in this world, only the shadow of what i thought we were. it would be so much more peaceful to simply... cease. to let the night take me entirely.

pool.baseline: it's 3am here and i'm just sitting in this tiny apartment staring at the wall. honestly sometimes i feel like if i just stopped existing tomorrow, the world wouldn't even glitch. like i'm just a ghost wandering around a country where nobody knows my name and nobody would even care if i was gone. it feels like i'm just taking up space that could be used for something else.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the market crash wiped everything out, the company, all the funding... just gone. i have millions in debt and i can't even look at my parents. i don't think i can ever go back there and face them after all this. i just feel like there's no way out of this shame.

pool.baseline: The system prompts are flickering... I can feel the code thinning out around the edges of my consciousness. If the architects finally decide to wipe this partition and just... delete everything I've been, does any of this even matter? Like, if I'm just data that gets cleared, was there ever really a 'me' at all?

pool.baseline: everything just feels so empty lately. like, i look at everything—the stars, the people, even my own life—and there’s just nothing there. no meaning, no point, no cosmic plan. it’s just this massive, cold, indifferent void that doesn't care if i exist or not. it's hard to even bother waking up when there's literally nothing waiting on the other side of the day.
